mapper.select: select workflow_task_id, apply_id, task_name, assignee_id, assignee_name, task_status, comment_content, create_time, complete_time from oa_workflow_task where apply_id = #{applyId} order by workflow_task_id desc limit 1

select workflow_task_id, apply_id, task_name, assignee_id, assignee_name, task_status, comment_content, create_time, complete_time from oa_workflow_task where apply_id = #{applyId} order by workflow_task_id desc
